concepts.title: Core Framework & Fundamentals
concepts.description: What is FastAPI, vs Flask/Django, Starlette+Pydantic architecture, ASGI vs WSGI, project structure, auto-generated OpenAPI/Swagger docs, installation

concepts.title: Routing & Path Operations
concepts.description: Path/query parameters with type validation, HTTP method decorators, APIRouter, route ordering, tags, deprecated routes, redirect responses

concepts.title: Request Handling & Response Models
concepts.description: JSON body parsing, Form data, File/UploadFile, response_model, status codes, JSONResponse/HTMLResponse/StreamingResponse, headers, cookies

concepts.title: Pydantic Models & Data Validation
concepts.description: BaseModel, Field() constraints, field_validator, model_validator, nested models, Optional vs required, model_dump, Pydantic v2 changes, BaseSettings, discriminated unions

concepts.title: Async Programming & Concurrency
concepts.description: async def vs def handlers, event loop, asyncio.gather, run_in_executor, async context managers, httpx async client, performance implications

concepts.title: Dependency Injection System
concepts.description: Depends(), class-based deps, yield deps (cleanup), sub-dependencies, caching, global dependencies, Annotated style, overriding for tests

concepts.title: Security & Authentication
concepts.description: OAuth2PasswordBearer, JWT creation/validation, password hashing, protecting routes, RBAC, API key auth, HTTPBearer, security scopes, token refresh

concepts.title: Middleware & CORS
concepts.description: @app.middleware("http"), CORSMiddleware config, execution order, custom middleware, GZipMiddleware, TrustedHostMiddleware, middleware vs deps

concepts.title: Error Handling & Validation Errors
concepts.description: HTTPException, custom exception handlers, RequestValidationError, StarletteHTTPException vs FastAPI's, error response formatting, logging

concepts.title: Database Integration & SQLAlchemy
concepts.description: SQLAlchemy setup, session dependency with yield, async SQLAlchemy, Alembic migrations, CRUD patterns, connection pooling, repository pattern

concepts.title: Testing FastAPI Applications
concepts.description: TestClient, pytest fixtures, dependency_overrides, async testing (httpx.AsyncClient), test DB isolation, mocking external APIs, testing file uploads

concepts.title: WebSockets & Real-time Features
concepts.description: WebSocket endpoints, accept/receive/send, WebSocketDisconnect, ConnectionManager pattern, authentication, JSON over WS, SSE alternative

concepts.title: Background Tasks & Lifespan Events
concepts.description: BackgroundTasks usage, lifespan context manager (replaces deprecated on_event), Celery/ARQ for heavy work, streaming responses

concepts.title: Performance & Optimization
concepts.description: Caching (Redis, in-memory), rate limiting, response compression, async optimization, connection pooling, N+1 prevention, pagination, load testing

concepts.title: Deployment & Production
concepts.description: Uvicorn/Gunicorn config, Docker (official python image, NOT deprecated tiangolo image), env vars, structured logging, health checks, reverse proxy, scaling
